name: German

sections.label: Eight German Courses Numbered GER-315 or Above
sections.description: Eight German courses numbered GER-315 or above. Up to three may be substituted with study abroad in a program approved by the College and the Department.

sections.label: German Literature Course — Senior Year
sections.description: One German literature course must be taken in the senior year.

sections.label: Study Abroad (optional, up to three courses)
sections.description: Students are urged to substitute study abroad in a program approved by the College and the Department for up to three of the eight required courses.

notes: A grade of C or higher must be earned in all courses counted toward the major. Students selecting German as a second teaching field need only a minimum of four GER courses numbered 315 or above (including GER-315 German Composition and Conversation). Students who study in a German-speaking country for a term may begin counting toward the major from Elementary German I (GER-115).
